summary: The user expressed a desire to hike in the Andes mountain range in South America and sought recommendations for starting points and lesser-known hiking routes. The user is particularly interested in the Inca Trail to Machu Picchu and plans to conduct further research on various hiking options in the Andes.
facts: The user has always wanted to go hiking in the Andes. The user is leaning towards hiking the Inca Trail to Machu Picchu. The user is interested in exploring lesser-known hiking routes in the Andes. The user plans to conduct more research to decide where to start their hiking trip in the Andes. The Andes mountain range runs through several countries including Chile, Bolivia, Peru, Ecuador, Colombia, Venezuela, Argentina, and the southern parts of Brazil. The user is considering the Colca Canyon Trek, the Huayhuash Circuit, the Ausangate Trek, and the Salkantay Trek as potential hiking routes in the Andes.
